docs.text: Welcome to MkDocs For full documentation visit mkdocs.org . Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage. ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.text: Homework #1 Q2[10 points] Find all artists born in the 1970s in England who have independently released music (without collaborators). List them in alphabetical order by artist name. File: q2_solo_artist Hints: The artist_count field in artist_credit denotes the number of artists involved in a release. England is an area name. Only consider artists who is a Person . Your output should look like this: ARTIST_NAME Your first row should look like this: Bashful 解析 select distinct(a1.name) from artist_credit as ac JOIN (select a.name from artist as a JOIN area on a.area=area.id and area.name='England' JOIN artist_type on artist_type.name='Person' and artist_type.id=a.type where a.begin_date_year>=1970 and a.begin_date_year<1980) as a1 on ac.name=a1.name and ac.artist_count=1 order by a1.name; 分为两个步骤，第一步是查询所有出生于 70年代 并且来自 England 并且 artist_type 是 Person 的人员。第二步是根据这个人员名单表去 artist_credit 表中根据 artist_count 查询每个人的音乐发行的参与者 输出 Bashful David Readman Dusty Wagon Henry J. Walmsley Ian Parker Jo Beth Young Levente Luke Warm Malia Matthew Brown Paul Lawler Paul Walton Phil Collins Ryan Webb Sophia Dady Talitha Rise Q3[10points] 这一题我使用的方式有点复杂。嵌套了5层sql，应该是最烂的解法。 Find the ten latest releases by female artists in the German language. Order the results by release date from newest to oldest, and then by release name and artist name alphabetically. File: q3_german_female_artists Details: If there are releases with identical names and dates by the same artist, treat them as a single release and avoid duplicate entries. Format the release_date in the result as YYYY-MM-DD , without adding a leading zero if the month or day is less than 10 . Your output should look like this: RELEASE_DATE|RELEASE_NAME|ARTIST_NAME Your first row should look like this: 2020-9-25|The Songs of Johannes Brahms ~ 10|Sophie Rennert 解析 该题涉及至少四个relation（数据表），如下图所示。一个release对应一个artist_credit，而一个artist_credit对应多个artist_credit_name，所以artist_credit可以被消去，直接使用一个release对应多个artist_credit。 erDiagram release ||--|| release_info : includes release ||--|{ language : uses release ||--|| artist_credit : by artist_credit ||--|{ artist_credit_name : comprises artist_credit_name ||--|| artist : maps artist ||--|| gender : has release { id INTEGER name TEXT artist_credit INTEGER status INTEGER language INTEGER comment TEXT } release_info { release INTEGER area INTEGER date_year INTEGER date_month INTEGER date_day INTEGER } language { id INTEGER name TEXT } artist_credit { id INTEGER name TEXT artist_count INTEGER } artist_credit_name { artist_credit INTEGER position INTEGER artist INTEGER name TEXT } artist { id INTEGER name TEXT begin_date_year INTEGER begin_date_month INTEGER begin_date_day INTEGER end_date_year INTEGER end_date_month INTEGER end_date_day INTEGER type INTEGER area INTEGER gender INTEGER comment TEXT } gender { id INTEGER name TEXT description TEXT } 思路是先获取language=‘German'的release作为re0，re0 join release_info获取年月日字段得到re1，re1 join artist_credit_name 获取一个release对应的各个artist作为re3，re3 join gender得到满足所有artist为女性的表。 该表用根据关键字排序，DISTINCT关键字去重，输出前十行。最后用printf函数把年日月转换为格式化日期字符串。 感觉有点像合并树的节点。每次挑选两个节点进行合并，直到剩下最后一个节点 输出 2020-9-25|The Songs of Johannes Brahms ~ 10|Sophie Rennert 2020-8-14|Verwoben|Martina Claussen 2020-7-9|Geh dein Weg|Loredana 2020-7-25|Hysteria|Strobo.Lolita 2020-7-2|Kein Limit|Aylo 2020-7-16|Never Know|Shirin David 2020-7-30|Signal|badmómzjay 2020-7-3|Sui Sui|Haiyti 2020-7-16|Vertrau mir|Juju 2020-6-12|Columbiana|addeN Q4[10points] List the artist groups with the longest names in each area where the area name starts with the letter "Z". Organize the final output by sorting first by area name and then by artist name in alphabetical order. If multiple groups within the same area share the longest names, include them all. File: q4_longest_name Hints: Group is an artist_type . If multiple areas have different id , but the same name , consider them as the same area. Your output should look like this: AREA_NAME|ARTIST_NAME One of the rows in the output looks like the following: Zaandam|TheBeatVillain 解析 一开始用的是下面这种方法，问题是无法处理一个area中存在多个最大值的情况。 select n2.area_name,n2.artist_name from ( select max(length(n1.name)) from ( select artist.name,artist.area from artist join artist_type on artist.type=artist_type.id and artist_type.name='Group' ) as n1 join area on area.name LIKE 'Z%' and n1.area=area.id group by area.name ) as n2 后面利用CTE减少重复查询。思路是先查询artist、artist_type和area建一个表n1，包含了artist_name、area_name、length(aritst_name)等，然后n1 join area再通过 group by 分组建立表n2，这样n2包含了每个地区的artist_name的最大值，然后n2 join n1再查询一次，匹配n1中artist_name长度等于n2中对应地区的长度最大值。 输出 Zaandam|TheBeatVillain Zaanstad|Desert Colossus Zabrze|The Dumplings Zacatecas|Cucs De Llum Zachodniopomorskie|Big Fat Mama Zadarska županija|Cyber Hate Zagreb|The Zagreb Folk Dance Ensemble Zagrebačka županija|Sudar Percussion Zagórz|Burek! Dobry Pies Zakopane|Omerta Zalaegerszeg|Vorkuta Zambia|Jeff Mulenga And The Explosives Zambrów|Masters Zamość|Time of the Sinners Zanesville|Zack Shelton and 64 to Grayson Zanzibar City|Kidumbak Kalcha Zaporizhia|Злые Морозы Zaragoza|The Downspiral to Hell Zaratamo|Fetitxe Zarautz|Buffalo Zarautz|Estigia Zawiercie|Stupify Zduńska Wola|OK, stop Zeeland|The Outside Agency Zelenogradsk|Feelament Zelenogradsky Administrative Okrug|Киоск Zermatt|Wintershome Zevenhuizen|VIIHB Zhengzhou|Lost Temple Zhuhai|Obsoletenova Zhytomyr|Night on Fire Zielona Góra|Black Water Panic Project Zielonka|Cyrk Deriglasoff Zimbabwe|Mechanic Manyeruke and the Puritans Zion|Aubergine Machine Zlaté Moravce|Belliciste Zlín|Titan Crusher Zoetermeer|Elizium Zofingen|Tiburon Zschopau|Dreaming Zug|Mindcollision Zuid-Holland|Magnavox Radio Zulia|VHG Zumaia|Voltaia Zumarraga|Triki-Triki Zurich|Ricercare-Ensemble für Alte Musik, Zürich Zushi|Des-Poz Zutphen|Orien Zweibrücken|Rage of Samedi Zwenkau|BUDDY in concert Zwickau|Gateway to Selfdestruction Zwiesel|Brightest Day Zwolle|BLONDE & DREADFUL Zürich|Stocker Sepp's 1. Unterwaldner Bauernkapelle Złotów|Protect This City
docs.title: CMU15445 Homework1

docs.text: Find all artists born in the 1970s in England who have independently released music (without collaborators). List them in alphabetical order by artist name. File: q2_solo_artist Hints: The artist_count field in artist_credit denotes the number of artists involved in a release. England is an area name. Only consider artists who is a Person . Your output should look like this: ARTIST_NAME Your first row should look like this: Bashful
docs.title: Q2[10 points]

docs.text: select distinct(a1.name) from artist_credit as ac JOIN (select a.name from artist as a JOIN area on a.area=area.id and area.name='England' JOIN artist_type on artist_type.name='Person' and artist_type.id=a.type where a.begin_date_year>=1970 and a.begin_date_year<1980) as a1 on ac.name=a1.name and ac.artist_count=1 order by a1.name; 分为两个步骤，第一步是查询所有出生于 70年代 并且来自 England 并且 artist_type 是 Person 的人员。第二步是根据这个人员名单表去 artist_credit 表中根据 artist_count 查询每个人的音乐发行的参与者
docs.title: 解析

docs.text: Bashful David Readman Dusty Wagon Henry J. Walmsley Ian Parker Jo Beth Young Levente Luke Warm Malia Matthew Brown Paul Lawler Paul Walton Phil Collins Ryan Webb Sophia Dady Talitha Rise
docs.title: 输出

docs.text: 这一题我使用的方式有点复杂。嵌套了5层sql，应该是最烂的解法。 Find the ten latest releases by female artists in the German language. Order the results by release date from newest to oldest, and then by release name and artist name alphabetically. File: q3_german_female_artists Details: If there are releases with identical names and dates by the same artist, treat them as a single release and avoid duplicate entries. Format the release_date in the result as YYYY-MM-DD , without adding a leading zero if the month or day is less than 10 . Your output should look like this: RELEASE_DATE|RELEASE_NAME|ARTIST_NAME Your first row should look like this: 2020-9-25|The Songs of Johannes Brahms ~ 10|Sophie Rennert
docs.title: Q3[10points]

docs.text: 该题涉及至少四个relation（数据表），如下图所示。一个release对应一个artist_credit，而一个artist_credit对应多个artist_credit_name，所以artist_credit可以被消去，直接使用一个release对应多个artist_credit。 erDiagram release ||--|| release_info : includes release ||--|{ language : uses release ||--|| artist_credit : by artist_credit ||--|{ artist_credit_name : comprises artist_credit_name ||--|| artist : maps artist ||--|| gender : has release { id INTEGER name TEXT artist_credit INTEGER status INTEGER language INTEGER comment TEXT } release_info { release INTEGER area INTEGER date_year INTEGER date_month INTEGER date_day INTEGER } language { id INTEGER name TEXT } artist_credit { id INTEGER name TEXT artist_count INTEGER } artist_credit_name { artist_credit INTEGER position INTEGER artist INTEGER name TEXT } artist { id INTEGER name TEXT begin_date_year INTEGER begin_date_month INTEGER begin_date_day INTEGER end_date_year INTEGER end_date_month INTEGER end_date_day INTEGER type INTEGER area INTEGER gender INTEGER comment TEXT } gender { id INTEGER name TEXT description TEXT } 思路是先获取language=‘German'的release作为re0，re0 join release_info获取年月日字段得到re1，re1 join artist_credit_name 获取一个release对应的各个artist作为re3，re3 join gender得到满足所有artist为女性的表。 该表用根据关键字排序，DISTINCT关键字去重，输出前十行。最后用printf函数把年日月转换为格式化日期字符串。 感觉有点像合并树的节点。每次挑选两个节点进行合并，直到剩下最后一个节点

docs.text: 2020-9-25|The Songs of Johannes Brahms ~ 10|Sophie Rennert 2020-8-14|Verwoben|Martina Claussen 2020-7-9|Geh dein Weg|Loredana 2020-7-25|Hysteria|Strobo.Lolita 2020-7-2|Kein Limit|Aylo 2020-7-16|Never Know|Shirin David 2020-7-30|Signal|badmómzjay 2020-7-3|Sui Sui|Haiyti 2020-7-16|Vertrau mir|Juju 2020-6-12|Columbiana|addeN

docs.text: List the artist groups with the longest names in each area where the area name starts with the letter "Z". Organize the final output by sorting first by area name and then by artist name in alphabetical order. If multiple groups within the same area share the longest names, include them all. File: q4_longest_name Hints: Group is an artist_type . If multiple areas have different id , but the same name , consider them as the same area. Your output should look like this: AREA_NAME|ARTIST_NAME One of the rows in the output looks like the following: Zaandam|TheBeatVillain
docs.title: Q4[10points]

docs.text: 一开始用的是下面这种方法，问题是无法处理一个area中存在多个最大值的情况。 select n2.area_name,n2.artist_name from ( select max(length(n1.name)) from ( select artist.name,artist.area from artist join artist_type on artist.type=artist_type.id and artist_type.name='Group' ) as n1 join area on area.name LIKE 'Z%' and n1.area=area.id group by area.name ) as n2 后面利用CTE减少重复查询。思路是先查询artist、artist_type和area建一个表n1，包含了artist_name、area_name、length(aritst_name)等，然后n1 join area再通过 group by 分组建立表n2，这样n2包含了每个地区的artist_name的最大值，然后n2 join n1再查询一次，匹配n1中artist_name长度等于n2中对应地区的长度最大值。
docs.title: 解析

docs.text:
问题：P1和P2等价吗？ bob_take_seat_1 = And(b1,Not(b2),Not(b3),Not(a1),Not(c1)) 表示bob坐1号位并且bob不做2号位和3号位，并且alice不坐1号位，calro不坐1号位。从中可以提炼出命题如P1和P2: \(P1:b1 	o ~b2 \land ~b3 \land ~a1 \land ~c1\) \(P2:b1 \land 
eg(b2)\land
eg(b3)\land
eg(a1) \land 
eg(c1))\) Z3 found a counterexample [b3 = False, a1 = False, b1 = False, c1 = False, b2 = True] 带入发现确实 P2:F T F F F P1:F -> F&T&T&T 解释： implies 意思是忽略错误前提而考虑正确前提 命题bob坐在1号位，是必须真的坐在1号位的，所以不能忽略bob不坐在1号位的情况 把命题P1改成 b1 & (b1 -> ~b2 & ~b3 & ~a1 & ~c1)即可proved 总结 P ^ P->Q P ^ Q是等价的
docs.title: 这两个命题等价吗

docs.text:
bob_take_seat_1 = And(b1,Not(b2),Not(b3),Not(a1),Not(c1)) 表示bob坐1号位并且bob不做2号位和3号位，并且alice不坐1号位，calro不坐1号位。从中可以提炼出命题如P1和P2: \(P1:b1 	o ~b2 \land ~b3 \land ~a1 \land ~c1\) \(P2:b1 \land 
eg(b2)\land
eg(b3)\land
eg(a1) \land 
eg(c1))\) Z3 found a counterexample [b3 = False, a1 = False, b1 = False, c1 = False, b2 = True] 带入发现确实 P2:F T F F F P1:F -> F&T&T&T
docs.title: 问题：P1和P2等价吗？

docs.text: implies 意思是忽略错误前提而考虑正确前提 命题bob坐在1号位，是必须真的坐在1号位的，所以不能忽略bob不坐在1号位的情况 把命题P1改成 b1 & (b1 -> ~b2 & ~b3 & ~a1 & ~c1)即可proved
docs.title: 解释：

docs.text: P ^ P->Q P ^ Q是等价的
docs.title: 总结
